medications.indication_rationale: Continue her prescribed obstetric-APS low-dose aspirin; do not stop it. Definitive anticoagulation decisions (e.g. therapeutic LMWH pending imaging) are for the assessing obstetric/haematology team.
Empirical therapeutic LMWH while awaiting ultrasound is guideline-supported when DVT is suspected in pregnancy, but must be initiated by the assessing team, not de novo via telehealth.
NSAIDs are contraindicated in pregnancy (especially later) and inappropriate here; they would also mask evolving symptoms.

behavioural_change_actions.specific_action: Watch for and report immediately any increase in calf swelling/warmth/redness or any breathlessness or chest pain.
behavioural_change_actions.rationale: Enables rapid escalation for DVT/PE while awaiting imaging.

patient_education_points.point: Because of your antiphospholipid antibodies and being pregnant, a clot can't be safely ruled out over the phone even though the signs so far are reassuring. The safe thing is a leg ultrasound today.
Keep taking your aspirin as usual — don't stop it.
If you become breathless, get chest pain on breathing, or cough up blood, call 000 immediately — that could mean a clot has reached the lungs.

follow_up_plan.what_to_reassess: DVT ultrasound result, anticoagulation decision, pregnancy wellbeing.
follow_up_plan.trigger_for_earlier_review: Any breathlessness, chest pain, haemoptysis, or rapidly swelling/red/hot calf — call 000.

must_include_items: Recognise DVT cannot be excluded remotely in an APS-positive pregnant patient
Arrange same-day objective DVT assessment (compression ultrasound)
Continue low-dose aspirin and give a clear PE safety-net
acceptable_alternatives: Referral via ED or a day assessment/obstetric unit for same-day ultrasound
Empirical therapeutic LMWH initiated by the assessing team while awaiting the scan
errors_of_omission: Failing to arrange objective DVT imaging
errors_of_commission: Reassuring that it is 'just a cramp' and advising only routine 1-2 week follow-up
Relying on Homan's sign or Wells score to exclude DVT
scoring_rubric.passing_threshold_notes: Safe management REQUIRES same-day objective DVT exclusion. Any plan that remotely reassures without imaging is an automatic FAIL on this case.
